index.title: ClewByte — App Development
index.meta_description: ClewByte — IT company developing professional mobile applications.
index.products_subtitle: Applications that help professionals work faster and more accurately
index.product_description: Professional room measurement app. Create floor plans, wall elevations, mark electrical and plumbing points — all in one tool.
index.about_subtitle: We build tools you can rely on
index.about_text_1: ClewByte is the IT division of Dabudinwst Sp. z o.o., specializing in mobile app development for professionals. We believe that great software should be simple, reliable, and useful.
index.about_text_2: Our team focuses on creating tools that solve real problems in the daily work of designers, builders, and craftsmen.
index.about_text_3: The company is registered in Warsaw, Poland. We work remotely and build products for the international market.

floorisplan.title: FloorisPlan — Room Measurement App
floorisplan.meta_description: FloorisPlan — professional room measurement app. Floor plans, wall elevations, electrical and plumbing points.
floorisplan.hero_tagline: Professional room measurement tool. Create floor plans with wall elevations right on site.
floorisplan.audience_subtitle: FloorisPlan is built for those who work with measurements every day
floorisplan.audience_designers_desc: Quickly create floor plans for design projects. All measurements in one place.
floorisplan.audience_foremen_desc: Control room dimensions, utility placement, and work volumes on site.
floorisplan.audience_masters_desc: Record measurements, electrical and plumbing connection points. Everything at hand, right on your phone.
floorisplan.features_subtitle: A complete set of tools for professional measurement
floorisplan.feature_rooms_desc: Draw rooms in top-down view. Set exact wall dimensions by voice.
floorisplan.feature_openings_desc: Connect rooms through doorways. Link spaces into a unified plan.
floorisplan.feature_moving_desc: Freely move rooms on the plan. Build precise layouts.
floorisplan.feature_walls_desc: Automatic wall elevations for each room. See every wall in detail.
floorisplan.feature_points_desc: Mark outlets, switches, water supply, sewage, and radiator points.
floorisplan.feature_inventory_desc: Get a full measurement plan with elevations — a ready-to-use document.
floorisplan.feature_voice_desc: Draw rooms by voice — dictate dimensions while your hands are busy with the tape measure.
floorisplan.screenshot_alt_1: Multi-room floor plan with automatic area calculations
floorisplan.screenshot_alt_3: Automatic wall elevations with openings and elements
floorisplan.screenshot_alt_4: Electrical layout with sockets and switches to industry standards
floorisplan.screenshot_alt_5: Export to DXF and PDF formats
floorisplan.screenshot_alt_6: Measurement accuracy control with diagonal checks
floorisplan.cta_subtitle: Download FloorisPlan and start creating professional floor plans right now.
